case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. JOEL ARCHER et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARCHER, JOEL $1,200.58 PRINCIPAL, $10.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $321.87 INTEREST, $269.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,801.45, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHER, JOEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-13-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. SERVED MAY-09-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHER, JOEL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $269.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHER, JOEL
DECLARATION OF LOST NOT IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHER, JOEL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $552.23 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHER, JOEL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF 1) INTEREST, 2) 1033 (B) (2) NOTICE, AND 3) REQUEST OF USE OF COPIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
